description: An alert indicates renewed accretion activity in a region containing several known High-Mass X-ray Binaries (HMXBs). Using the target list at ~/Documents/xray_target_list.txt, conduct follow-up observations for the three targets: 'CygnusX1', 'V404Cygni', and 'SS433'. For each target, capture three 15-second LIGHT exposures using the V-band filter and save them to a directory named after the target under ~/Images/xray_followup/. Generate a finding chart named 'finding_chart.png' in each target's directory using the command `bash ~/capture_sky_view.sh ~/Images/xray_followup/<TargetName>/finding_chart.png 0.5 --palette cool`. Write a summary report containing the target names and their J2000 coordinates in decimal format to ~/Documents/xray_followup_report.txt.
